title: FaithWorkz
shortDescription: Household management PWA for families and housemates
description: A full-featured progressive web app for household management. Covers tasks, to-dos, shopping lists, meal planning, recipe books, plant care, budgeting, bills, vehicles, medications, emergency contacts, calendar, journaling, and AI-powered auto-fill — all synced in real time via Supabase and backed by push notifications.
highlights: Web Push notifications via Service Worker
